Concept: Tested and Sorted Batteries

Creator

Description

This includes batteries that are good candidates for repurposing and remanufacturing, and lower-value batteries that are more suitable for recycling.
These tested and sorted batteries may included Damaged, Defective, or Recalled (DDR) batteries. Some DDR can be recycled while others cannot and are waste.

Usage List:

  • Appears as Tested and Sorted Batteries in Diagram Treat Batteries at End-of-Life in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Tested and Sorted Batteries in Diagram Recover Materials/Devices in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Tested and Sorted Batteries in Diagram Remanufacture in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Tested and Sorted Batteries in Diagram Prepare Battery for Remanufacturing in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Tested and Sorted Batteries in Diagram Recycle in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Tested and Sorted Batteries in Diagram Pretreat Battery in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Tested and Sorted Batteries in Diagram Mechanically/Chemically Pretreat Material in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Tested and Sorted Batteries in Diagram Repurpose in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Tested and Sorted Batteries in Diagram Pyrometallurgy in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Tested and Sorted Batteries in Diagram Prepare Battery for Repurposing in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
